description: Synthetic negotiation dataset generated based on the eBay Best Offer codebook (Backus et al.). Contains listing-level and offer-thread-level data mimicking real eBay bargaining structure.
source_reference: Codebook based on Backus, Blake, Larsen et al. — eBay Best Offer dataset. Structure informed by Larsen (2021), 'The Efficiency of Real-World Bargaining', Review of Economic Studies.

metadata.generation_method: AI-generated synthetic data following codebook schema
